findings.description: Header layout flattened into a single column.
findings.evidence: The PDF features a distinct two-column header with the agency logo and name on the left and a list of officials on the right, separated by a vertical yellow line. The HTML conversion stacks all of this information vertically into a single column.

findings.description: Loss of visual emphasis and formatting in main titles.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the text 'PUBLIC NOTICE' is prominent, colored red, and larger than surrounding text. The main subject 'Nomination Period for Henderson County Board of Social Services' is in a very large, bold font. The HTML renders all of these elements in a standard black font with reduced sizing and no bold weight, losing the intended visual hierarchy.
